scene_summary: A modern minimalist dining-room scene with a built-in display cabinet, a dining table and chairs, decorative wall art, and ceiling lighting.
albedo_material_notes: The intrinsic color of the walls and cabinet frame is light gray, and the intrinsic color of the inner cabinet shelves is white.
Display items: the ceramic bottle is pure black; the deer ornament is metallic gold; the plant is green; and the flower pot is white.
The dining table intrinsic color is white, and the chair legs are light wood.
The wall painting has a white background with black-and-gold abstract patterns, which are intrinsic texture details that must be preserved.
The decorative flowers on the table are white, and the accompanying leaves are green.
albedo_lighting_notes: Bright emitting regions from ceiling spotlights and the pendant lamp belong to light sources, not intrinsic material color.
Dark regions under cabinet shelves and beneath display items are environmental shadows and should be removed.
Bright spots on the ceramic bottle, metallic objects, and glass containers are specular highlights, not intrinsic color.
Over-bright areas near the right window are exposure artifacts rather than material color.
Brightness variation on the table surface is caused by illumination/reflection and should be normalized to a white intrinsic color.
albedo_prompt_suffix: Preserve all intrinsic textures and patterns, and fully remove shadows, highlights, overexposure, and environmental reflections so intrinsic colors are accurate and consistent across materials.

per_view.albedo_hint: Accurately recover the intrinsic colors of all display items in the cabinet, remove cabinet shadows and object-surface highlights, and preserve the complete wall-art pattern texture.
